summary: Auth Gateway Flow tested end-to-end. All 11 test cases passed. Gateway screen, partner code validation, branding, redirect protection, localStorage persistence all working correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: /login with no stored partner code shows gateway screen (bg-slate-950 dark, Building2 icon, partner-code-input, partner-code-submit)
TEST 2: Entering invalid partner code 'invalid-code-xyz' shows 'Partner code not found' error via data-testid='gateway-error'
TEST 3: Entering valid partner code 'automate-accounts' transitions to branded login form showing 'AUTOMATE ACCOUNTS' partner name
TEST 4: Login form has all required elements - email input, password input, Sign In button, Forgot password? link, Create an account link, change partner button
TEST 5: 'Using the wrong partner code? (automate-accounts)' button resets to gateway AND clears aa_partner_code from localStorage
TEST 6: Successful login with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! — redirected to /admin (Control Panel)
TEST 7: /signup without stored partner code redirects to /login (gateway screen)
TEST 8: /forgot-password without stored partner code redirects to /login (gateway screen)
TEST 9: After entering partner code, navigating to /signup shows branded signup page with partner badge 'Partner: Automate Accounts' and Change link (not partner code input)
TEST 10: 'Register as a partner organization' link on gateway navigates to /signup?type=partner and shows partner-signup-page
TEST 11: Partner code 'automate-accounts' persists in localStorage (aa_partner_code) after validation — page refresh goes directly to branded login form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth gateway flow fully verified and working. Key localStorage key: 'aa_partner_code'. data-testid selectors used: auth-gateway, partner-code-input, partner-code-submit, gateway-error, login-form, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, forgot-password-link, register-customer-link, change-partner-btn, register-partner-link, signup-page, change-partner-from-signup, partner-signup-page. Gateway screen uses bg-slate-950 dark background. Brand applied from /api/website-settings?partner_code=. Validation via /api/tenant-info?code=. ForgotPassword.tsx and Signup.tsx both correctly redirect to /login when no aa_partner_code in localStorage.
